intro: Test your knowledge and discover surprising cultures from around the world!
description:
The world is full of surprising customs, traditions, and ways of life!

Amazing World Cultures: True or False Quiz is a casual quiz game where you can learn about greetings, food, festivals, manners, and everyday culture from countries around the globe through simple true-or-false questions.

Is it true? Or is it false?

As you play, you will uncover fun facts and fascinating cultural differences from around the world.

Perfect for trivia fans, curious learners, and players who want to have fun while discovering something new.

Enjoy a quiz adventure packed with surprises, knowledge, and global culture!
